mapper.sql: id, snapshot_id, user_id, title, description, priority, action_type, target_route, reason, expected_gain, estimated_minutes, status, sort_order, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from ai_growth_coach_action where snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} order by sort_order asc, id asc
select from ai_growth_coach_action where id = #{id} limit 1
select count(1) from ai_growth_coach_action where status = 'DONE'
